reason: Skill Tests UI refactor primarily changes browser-side layout, structure, and interaction patterns.
Reuse existing eval-cases UI patterns where possible instead of forking behavior.
Keep the refactor front-end focused and avoid accidental backend churn.

summary: Skill Tests UI refactor follow-up: restored the summary retry binding after a truncated renderSummary block, added overview/detail status callout containers with shared styles, and surfaced clearer refresh/next-step guidance for list/summary/detail states without changing backend contracts.

Finalized the Skill Tests UI refactor for closeout: kept the sticky top action bar, single-column-first layout, tabbed detail workflow, and list-side quick actions as the final interaction model, while accepting the non-sticky detail header as the zoom-safe final UX after manual review.
